overview: FitLife AI is a personalized fitness and nutrition management platform. It calculates your BMI and BMR, generates customized meal plans based on your dietary preferences and goals, provides a curated exercise library with video tutorials, and tracks your weekly progress with visual charts.
features: Internet Identity login with protected pages
BMI and BMR calculator with health category badges
Personalized meal plans for Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian diets
Daily caloric target tracking with food logging
Exercise library with 25+ exercises and embedded YouTube tutorials
Weekly progress dashboard with BMI trend, caloric intake, and workout consistency charts
